autoFocus.description: Whether to auto-focus the first focusable element inside the popover when opened.

closeOnEscape.description: Whether to close the popover when the escape key is pressed.

closeOnInteractOutside.description: Whether to close the popover when the outside is clicked.

defaultOpen.description: The initial open state of the popover when uncontrolled.

defaultTriggerValue.description: The default trigger value when uncontrolled.

finalFocusEl.description: Element to receive focus when the popover is closed.

id.description: The unique identifier of the popover.

ids.type:
Partial<{
    anchor: string
    trigger: string | ((value?: string) => string)
    content: string
    title: string
    description: string
    closeTrigger: string
    positioner: string
    arrow: string
  }>
ids.description: The ids of the elements in the popover. Useful for composition.

initialFocusEl.description: Element to receive focus when the popover is opened.

modal.description: Whether the popover renders as a modal overlay.

open.description: The controlled open state of the popover.

portalled.description: Whether the popover content is portalled.

positioning.description: The positioning options for the popover content.

restoreFocus.description: Whether to restore focus to the previously focused element when closed.

value.description: The popover machine returned by usePopover().
